name: helmholtzPoFStructure
description: Helmholtz Program-Oriented Funding (PoF) structure identifier indicating the hierarchical research program classification.
ExpectedUse: Mapping research outputs to Helmholtz Association's program-oriented funding structure for reporting, portfolio analysis, and strategic planning.
